text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One afternoon...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(How unbecoming of me to have left something in
the classroom... I could fetch it tomorrow, but I
think today I'll—)
Mumble, mumble.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (...Is someone speaking in the classroom?)

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: ...Are you sure this is what you want?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...I'm sure. Because... I've been left behind.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
That's why, sometime this year... I'm thinking of
quitting racing...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Well, I just wanted to let you know today, as soon
as I could... With that out of the way, I should be
leaving.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Sakura Chiyono O! Please! You must reconsider—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Chiyono O!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ngh?! Ardan?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'm terribly sorry! I didn't mean to eavesdrop, but
what you were saying just now—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Ah! Chiyono O!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Chiyono O, wait!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Why... Why would you ever consider quitting
racing?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Your legs are healing all the time, little by little.
And you're even back at the academy now! You'll
be able to run again soon!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: So why would you...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Would you... tell me the reason?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...There's no one else here. I'm glad.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Right after the Derby, when I found out I'd have
to be hospitalized...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I thought... I could recover and then throw myself
back into racing again...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But time went on with me being unable to train at
all, and as I watched the Twinkle Series at home
or from my hospital room...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I became more and more afraid...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I saw all the races that you and Yaeno entered.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
And I could tell... you were both getting stronger
by the day...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I thought you two were amazing... and so cool...
And every time I thought that...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't help wondering, "Why am I here right
now?"

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It felt like... you two were going someplace far,
far away.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Then it dawned on me... that this was my future...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...And besides, even I know it.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I know my running won't improve any further... I
know I reached my limit a long time ago...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
So, there's probably no point in my returning to
racing.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: And if there's no point...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Then I figured I might as well quit racing.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: That was all I had to say. Okay, I'll be going now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: You and I may be kindred spirits after all.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
All that you shared with me just now... All those
sentiments sounded similar to ones I once held
myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
After I enrolled in Tracen Academy, there was a
period during which my body kept me from
training as intensely as I wanted to, even though I
was race-ready.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
As I watched everyone else make their debuts, I
was haunted by a constant anxiety—the fear that
I would simply peter out...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'm quite sure that... had I remained alone, the
anxiety would have overwhelmed me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: However...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: You were there, by my side.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
You encouraged and supported me, and had full
faith that I would debut successfully. Thanks to
you...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I was able to better myself, gain confidence, and
eventually take on the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...But that's not all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
During the Japanese Derby, you raced against me
as my rival without holding anything back.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It was through the clash we shared that day that I
learned one can surpass one's limits and improve
by competing with a rival.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Chiyono O, you helped bring me to my present
moment.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
As such, it is now my turn to help take you to
yours.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I always believed that you'd make your return to
racing one day.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Even if you're struggling to have faith in yourself,
I will keep believing in you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: As... your rival.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But... But! I-I haven't been able to run at all! Not
for such a long time!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
And in the time I spent out of action... I lost all
my potential—I lost everything! So there's no way
I could ever catch up...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
As long as you have rivals, Chiyono O, those
limits you're thinking of can be surpassed over
and over again.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I know that you'll overcome your current limits, just as I once did. And you'll be able to compete against us again.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I'll never—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: The Osaka Hai.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
That race is approaching, and when it does, I shall
be racing against Yaeno once again.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if you wouldn't mind... coming along and
watching our battle in person?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I believe that words won't always suffice and that
there are some things we can only convey through
our running.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I wish for you to feel it yourself, Chiyono O,
through my running—the possibility that you can
surpass your own limits.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ardan...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I shall wait for you, for however long it takes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing Mejiro Ardan's recount of Sakura
Chiyono O's situation gives me a glimpse into her
feelings...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...I have the utmost faith in her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I believe that Chiyono O will make her comeback
and reappear before us as a rival to behold.
choice_data_list: I think your faith will be rewarded.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having witnessed firsthand how strong their bond
is, I can say that with confidence.
choice_data_list: Let's do our best for the Osaka Hai.
Let's do our best for the Osaka Hai.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Yes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The momentous Osaka Hai will soon be upon us!
